blocks.description: Source protocol/distribution (e.g. Optimism, Arbitrum DAO, Jupiter).
Distributor mechanism used to deliver this claim.
Address that will receive the claimed tokens.
Merkle inclusion proof; set of 0x-hex sibling hashes. Required for kind = "merkle_distributor".
EIP-712 signature (0x-hex bytes) authorizing the claim. Required for kind = "signature_distributor".
----- Live inputs (flattened from `ClaimAirdropLiveInputs`) ----- Whether the claim is still available (not expired and not already claimed).
Actual claimable amount (U256 hex). Some airdrops are dynamic (e.g. vesting).
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Token to be received; some distributions resolve the token dynamically.
Start of the optional claim window (unix seconds). Flattened from `LiveField<Option<(Time, Time)>>`; either both bounds are present or both absent.
End of the optional claim window (unix seconds). See `claimWindowStart`.
CAIP-2 id of the chain hosting the distributor contract.
Leaf index in the Merkle tree; present iff kind = "merkle_distributor".
Governance token whose voting power is being delegated.
Address receiving the delegated voting power.
----- Live inputs (flattened from `DelegateLiveInputs`) ----- Address currently delegated to. Absent means no current delegate has ever been recorded (most ERC20Votes tokens initialise to zero/self).
Current voting power held by the delegator (U256 hex). For balance- backed tokens this is the delegator's token balance.
LiveField<Price>: current pool price (decimal serialized as string), used by policies to validate concentrated-range geometry against the current tick. `pool_state` is reducer-internal and omitted.
Tick lower bound (signed). Present iff kind = "tick".
Tick upper bound (signed). Present iff kind = "tick".
U128 hex liquidity at mint time. Present iff kind = "tick".
Active bin id at mint time. Present iff kind = "bin".
Free-form protocol identifier. Present iff kind = "custom".
Tokens deposited (set-like; original Vec order lost). Pooled.
Minimum LP tokens out (U256 hex). Pooled.
Token pair of the pool. ConcentratedMint.
Desired amounts (a = first of pair, b = second). U256 hex.
Minimum acceptable amounts (slippage floor). U256 hex.
Tick / bin / custom range for the new position. ConcentratedMint.
Recipient of LP tokens (Pooled) or position NFT (ConcentratedMint). ConcentratedIncrease has no recipient field (target is the existing NFT).
Intent venue the order was signed against.
EIP-712 signature authorizing the cancellation (0x-hex bytes). Present only for venues that require a separate cancel-sig (e.g. CowSwap off-chain cancel).
NFT position key whose fees are being collected.
LiveField<Vec<(TokenRef, U256)>>: fees owed to the position at simulation time (set-like; original Vec order lost).
LiveField<Vec<(TokenRef, U256)>>: fees owed to the position at simulation time (set-like; order lost). `pool_state` is reducer-internal and omitted.
Amount of LP token to burn (U256 hex). PooledBurn.
Minimum acceptable output per underlying token (set-like; original Vec order lost). PooledBurn.
Recipient of withdrawn tokens. PooledBurn only; the V3 variants send to the NFT owner / are noop respectively.
NFT position key. ConcentratedDecrease and ConcentratedBurn.
Amount of V3 liquidity to burn (U128 hex). ConcentratedDecrease.
Minimum acceptable amounts (slippage floor). U256 hex. ConcentratedDecrease.
Intent venue receiving the signed order.
Amount of sell token offered (U256 hex).
Minimum acceptable amount of buy token (U256 hex).
Recipient of the buy token when the order fills (Address).
LiveField<Price>: expected fill price at simulation time (decimal serialized as string).
LiveField<u32>: number of active competing orders on the same pair.
Slippage tolerance in basis points, applied across the whole route.
Sum of estimated_out across all RoutePaths (U256 hex). Route shape (paths × hops) is too complex for Cedar — only the summary is exposed.
LiveField<U256> projection: estimated total output (U256 hex).
LiveField<u32>: estimated price impact in basis points.
Exact amount of tokenIn sold (U256 hex). Present iff exact_input.
Minimum acceptable tokenOut (U256 hex). Present iff exact_input.
Maximum tokenIn willing to spend (U256 hex). Present iff exact_output.
Exact tokenOut to receive (U256 hex). Present iff exact_output.
Identifier of the sale within the platform.
----- Live inputs (flattened from `ClaimAllocationLiveInputs`) ----- Token component of `LiveField<(TokenRef, U256)>`.
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Refund owed due to oversubscription (U256 hex).
Whether the allocation is currently claimable.
Amount to claim (U256 hex); absent claims the maximum currently available.
----- Live inputs (flattened from `ClaimVestedLiveInputs`) ----- Amount currently claimable from the vesting schedule (U256 hex).
Next unlock time (unix seconds). Present iff there is a next unlock.
Next unlock amount (U256 hex). Present iff there is a next unlock.
Identifier of the sale within the platform.
Token used to pay into the sale.
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Address receiving the resulting allocation/claim rights.
----- Live inputs (flattened from `CommitLiveInputs`) ----- Current sale state (cap, window, vest schedule, totals).
Per-user commit cap enforced by the platform (U256 hex).
Amount already committed by the user (U256 hex).
Expected sale price (Decimal as string). Optional inside `LiveField<Option<Price>>`.
Identifier of the sale within the platform.
----- Live inputs (flattened from `RefundLiveInputs`) ----- Amount eligible to be refunded (U256 hex).
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Token of the asset being refunded.
Identifier of the sale within the platform.
Amount to withdraw (U256 hex); absent withdraws the full committed balance.
----- Live inputs (flattened from `WithdrawCommitLiveInputs`) ----- Amount currently available to withdraw (U256 hex).
Current sale state used to verify withdrawal is still permitted.
Borrower of record; defaults to submitter when omitted.
Borrow asset price in USD (Price/Decimal as string).
Current borrow rate for the chosen RateMode (Decimal as string).
Liquidity available in the reserve for borrowing (U256 hex).
Asset whose borrow allowance is being delegated.
Address being granted the borrow allowance.
Rate mode covered by the delegation: "variable" | "stable".
Asset whose collateral flag is being disabled.
Asset whose collateral flag is being enabled.
Debt asset being repaid by the liquidator.
Debt amount the liquidator covers (U256 hex).
Aave V3 option — receive seized collateral as aToken instead of underlying.
Live inputs (flattened from LiveField<T>). Account state of the borrower being liquidated.
Debt asset price in USD (Price/Decimal as string).
Collateral asset price in USD (Price/Decimal as string).
Amount to repay (U256 hex); U256::MAX = full repay.
Rate mode of the debt being repaid: "variable" | "stable".
Debtor of record; defaults to submitter when omitted.
Aave V3 flag — repay directly using aToken balance.
Current outstanding debt for the chosen RateMode (U256 hex).
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Beneficiary; defaults to submitter when omitted.
Asset whose debt rate mode is being switched.
Target rate mode after the swap: "variable" | "stable".
Live inputs — (variable, stable) tuples flattened to named fields.
Amount to withdraw (U256 hex); U256::MAX = max-withdraw.
Maximum amount the user can withdraw right now (U256 hex).
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Current `permit` nonce on the token contract (U256 hex; LiveField inner).
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Address authorized to operate the NFT.
Chain on which the collection lives (CAIP-2 id).
Underlying token whose allowance is delegated through `Permit2`.
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Timestamp at which the allowance expires (unix seconds).
Underlying token whose allowance is delegated through `Permit2`.
USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.
Timestamp at which the allowance expires (unix seconds).
Timestamp at which the signature itself expires (unix seconds).
Token whose allowance is being revoked (erc20, permit2_lockdown).
Spender losing the allowance (erc20, nft_set_for_all, permit2_lockdown).
Chain on which the collection lives (nft_set_for_all).
0x-hex raw calldata (use length-based heuristics in policy)
